# Version 3.116.0
> **First stable SkiaSharp 3** · Released December 2, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.0)

> **Supersedes [3.0.0](3.0.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release, built on Skia milestone 116 with .NET 9, WinUI and Blazor support. This release is the culmination of the six-preview v3 line: it removes the v2 [Obsolete] surface, moves to Skia m116, refreshes every bundled native dependency, and adds first-class WPF, WinUI, MAUI and Blazor views alongside .NET 9 and Mac Catalyst Metal. Please review the breaking changes before upgrading.

## Breaking Changes

- **Obsolete v2 APIs removed** — Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2 has been removed — including the legacy GRContext.Create/GRGlInterface.Assemble* factories, the SKBitmap.GetAddr*/Index8 helpers, the InstallPixels overload that took an SKColorTable, and GetRecommendedSampleCount/SetResourceCacheLimits. Move to the replacement each obsolete attribute pointed at (CreateGl/CreateOpenGl/GetPixel/GetResourceCacheLimit) before upgrading. ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539))
- **SKFilterQuality replaced by SKSamplingOptions** — The v2 SKFilterQuality drawing paths were replaced with SKSamplingOptions in v3. Compatibility overloads are provided that keep SKFilterQuality-based calls compiling and map to the equivalent sampling options, but new code should use SKSamplingOptions directly. ([#2963](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2963), [#2924](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2924))

## Engine

- **Skia milestone 116** — Bumps the bundled Skia through milestones 115 and 116, matching upstream Chrome Stable. — ❤️ [@Redth](https://github.com/Redth) ([#2829](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2829), [#2885](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2885), [#3026](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3026))

## API Surface

- **SKBlender and richer SKPicture** — Exposes SKBlender, the R-tree overload of BeginRecording, additional SKPicture APIs, and SKImage.ToRawShader for advanced rendering pipelines. ([#2830](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2830), [#2889](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2889), [#2883](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2883), [#2748](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2748))
- **New Skottie and text APIs** — Binds the Skottie Animation.Builder and cleans up SKTextBlobBuilder/SKRunBuffer, and brings back text-based blobs. ([#2630](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2630), [#2775](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2775), [#2545](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2545))
- **Span overloads across the surface** — Adds Span<T> overloads to the color filters, SetRectRadii, and SKMatrix helpers, and adds GetPixelSpan with offsets. — ❤️ [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313), [@alexandrvslv](https://github.com/alexandrvslv) ([#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2949](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2949), [#3030](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3030), [#2609](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2609))
- **New platform views** — Adds SKGLElement to WPF, SKGLView for MAUI, WinUI accelerated views, and DPI on the Blazor components. — ❤️ [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81), [@beto-rodriguez](https://github.com/beto-rodriguez) ([#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317), [#2598](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2598), [#2733](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2733), [#1832](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/1832))
- **Function pointers and LibraryImport** — Rewrites the interop layer around function pointers and LibraryImport for better AOT and trimming behaviour. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917))

## Bug Fixes

- **Memory-leak sweep** — Fixes memory leaks in the MAUI views, an AVE when disposing a cloned SKPaint, and the GetKerningPairAdjustments API. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid), [@pdjonov](https://github.com/pdjonov) ([#2955](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2955), [#2904](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2904), [#2858](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2858))
- **Uno and Xaml canvases** — SKXamlCanvas now handles unloaded XamlRoot, Uno Skia uses Bgra8888, the Uno canvas context stays active while rendering, and WASM no longer fails when the canvas cannot be found. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban), [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2854](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2854), [#2918](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2918), [#2559](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2559), [#2563](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2563))
- **Metal on Apple** — Uses Metal as the backend on Mac Catalyst and fixes Snapshot returning magenta on Apple Metal. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **SKBitmap.Encode PNG behaviour restored** — Restores the v2.88.8 behaviour of SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions. — ❤️ [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#3014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3014))

## Platform

- **.NET 9 and modern workloads** — Adds .NET 9 support alongside .NET 8, updates the SDK/workloads/projects, and refreshes the WinForms GLControl packages. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban) ([#3010](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3010), [#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#2989](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2989))
- **WASM: SIMD and multi-threading** — Adds multi-threaded and SIMD WebAssembly variants and fixes the Blazor import for apps with a base path. ([#2620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2620), [#3092](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3092))
- **Metal APIs on a common TFM** — Brings the Metal APIs onto a common .NET TFM across Apple platforms. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788))
- **AOT-friendly WinUI** — Updates IBufferByteAccess for AOT and marks PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2920](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2920), [#2717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2717))

## Security

- **Bundled native dependencies refreshed** — Updates HarfBuzz to 8.3.0, libwebp to 1.3.2, libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0, and pulls in the fontconfig refresh via the m116 bump. ([#2624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2624), [#2622](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2622), [#2583](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2583), [#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0

Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.0 and picks up the .NET 9 support, the function-pointer/LibraryImport rewrite, and the multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly variants in the HarfBuzzSharp binding. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#3089](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3089), [#3087](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3087), [#2620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2620), [#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2730), [#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582), [#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539), [#2505](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2505))

## Preview 6 (November 5, 2024)

Preview 6 added the Skia m116 bump, multi-threaded/SIMD WebAssembly, and the SKMatrix/SKPath Span<SKPoint> overloads.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.5.4...v3.116.0-preview.6.1)

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 added .NET 9 support, .NET 8 workload updates, the SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, and fixed MAUI view memory leaks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 added SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, more SKPicture APIs, the color-filter Span overloads, and fixed the AVE in cloned SKPaint dispose.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 brought the Metal APIs onto a common TFM, added SKGLElement for WPF, DPI on the Blazor components, and the Apple Metal magenta fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 bound the Skottie Animation.Builder, added SKImage.ToRawShader, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 modernised the repository, removed the [Obsolete] surface, updated the Skottie/HarfBuzz/libjpeg-turbo/webp dependencies, and set up the new packaging.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
